definition:
κατα-λέγω 
 [in LXX: Deu.19:16 (עָנָה), 2Ma.7:30 R * ;] 
  1. to lay down; mid. (in Hom.), to lie down. 
   2. to narrate (LXX, ll. with). 
   3. to choose out, hence, to enrol (as of soldiers, Hdt., Thuc., a1., see LS, see word): of widows, pass., 1Ti.5:9 (cf. Ellic.; CGT, in l).†
 (AS)
